feature_description: Display authentication, authorization (RBAC), and emergency-admin posture in the startup banner and the Settings -> System Info page

steps.name: Extend SystemInfo DTO and SystemInfoService (backend service unit tests)
steps.description: Add authenticationEnabled, authorizationEnabled, emergencyAdminSubjects to the SystemInfo record. Populate them from IConfiguration in SystemInfoService. Cover via Lighthouse.Backend.Tests/Services/SystemInfoServiceTest.cs extensions.
acceptance_criteria: SystemInfo record has IsAuthenticationEnabled (bool), IsAuthorizationEnabled (bool), EmergencyAdminSubjects (IReadOnlyList<string>) properties
SystemInfoService.GetSystemInfo reads Authentication:Enabled, Authorization:Enabled, and Authorization:EmergencySystemAdminSubjects from IConfiguration
All existing SystemInfoServiceTest cases remain green
New unit tests cover: auth enabled true/false, RBAC enabled true/false, empty/single/multiple emergency admin subjects
steps.scenario_name: Service-level unit coverage of new fields (supports milestone-1 integration scenarios)

steps.name: Expose new fields via GET /api/latest/SystemInfo (controller test + integration verification)
steps.description: Verify the SystemInfoController returns the new fields with correct JSON camelCase serialization. Extend SystemInfoControllerTest.cs with assertions for the new fields. The controller itself needs no logic change (DTO contract change only).
acceptance_criteria: Controller test asserts the new fields appear in the returned SystemInfo with correct values
JSON property names are authenticationEnabled, authorizationEnabled, emergencyAdminSubjects (camelCase via default ASP.NET Core JSON options)

steps.name: Add auth posture lines to the startup banner
steps.description: Extend Program.PrintSystemInfo to emit 'Authentication: Enabled/Disabled', 'Authorization: Enabled/Disabled', and 'Emergency Admin: <subjects>' lines (the last only when RBAC is enabled AND subjects are present). Cover via a new test that captures Log output from the banner.
acceptance_criteria: Banner output includes 'Authentication : Enabled' when Authentication:Enabled = true
Banner output includes 'Authentication : Disabled' when Authentication:Enabled = false
Banner output includes 'Authorization : Enabled' or 'Disabled' matching Authorization:Enabled
Banner includes 'Emergency Admin : <comma-joined-subjects>' when RBAC is enabled AND subjects non-empty
Banner omits the Emergency Admin line when subjects empty
Banner omits the Emergency Admin line when RBAC is disabled (even if subjects configured)

steps.name: Extend SystemInfo TypeScript model
steps.description: Add the three new optional fields to the TypeScript SystemInfo interface and update SystemInfoService.test.ts to assert the new fields deserialize correctly.
acceptance_criteria: SystemInfo interface has authenticationEnabled?: boolean, authorizationEnabled?: boolean, emergencyAdminSubjects?: string[]
SystemInfoService.test.ts asserts the three new fields are present and correctly typed in the deserialised response (per F-001 contract requirement from feature-delta adapter coverage)
steps.scenario_name: Frontend HTTP contract test for new fields (adapter coverage Mandate 6)

steps.name: Render Authentication, Authorization, and Emergency Admin rows in SystemInfoDisplay
steps.description: Extend SystemInfoDisplay.tsx to render the three new rows. Emergency Admin row is conditional: shown only when authorizationEnabled is true AND emergencyAdminSubjects is non-empty.
acceptance_criteria: Row 'Authentication' with value 'Enabled' or 'Disabled' rendered always
Row 'Authorization' with value 'Enabled' or 'Disabled' rendered always
Row 'Emergency Admin' rendered only when authorizationEnabled true AND emergencyAdminSubjects.length > 0
Multiple emergency admins joined with ', '
All existing SystemInfoDisplay tests remain green
quality_gates: pnpm build passes (Biome clean, tsc clean, vite clean)

steps.name: Cross-layer integration test (banner + API agree)
steps.description: Add an integration test that boots a real WebApplicationFactory<Program> with configured auth settings, captures banner output via a Serilog test sink, and asserts the banner and a GET /api/latest/SystemInfo response describe the same configuration.
acceptance_criteria: Test boots WebApplicationFactory<Program> with overridden Authentication:Enabled, Authorization:Enabled, Authorization:EmergencySystemAdminSubjects
Test captures banner output (Log.Logger Information sink)
Test issues GET /api/latest/SystemInfo with authenticated client
Asserts banner line values match the API response field values for all three new fields
